name: compliance source contract validator requires a paywalled true entry to declare a document_url and attribution_note
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:
  - {id: x, name: x, url: x, authoritative_publisher: x, jurisdiction: x, applicable_to: [x], identifier_scheme: x, fetch_frequency: weekly, legal_review_required: false, paywalled: true, why_authoritative: "a
b
c"}
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml --check paywalled 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'paywalled_missing_document_url' err.txt && grep -q 'paywalled_missing_attribution_note' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
